This document is the validation report for codebrain v0.1. Some sections are populated automatically (the static baseline); the rest are filled in by the operator as evidence accumulates via the procedure documented in `scripts/dogfood/MANUAL-MEASUREMENTS.md`.

### Stale-page detection accuracy

- **Target**: ≥ 95%
- **Procedure**: edit N tracked source files in a fixture repo; count how many `.brain/code/<path>.md` pages flip to STALE correctly via the M#4 PostToolUse hook
- **Status**: pending
- **Measurement framework**: covered by `tests/e2e-test.sh` T22 (hook behavior on fixture); production validation TBD
- **Notes**: T22 already passes; expanding to a "edit 20 real source files, count flips" measurement is straightforward once an operator runs it

### Wiki freshness drift

- **Target**: < 5% of pages stale after 1 week of typical agent work
- **Procedure**: `scripts/dogfood/MANUAL-MEASUREMENTS.md` § M2
- **Status**: pending
- **Per-repo measurements**: <!-- operator: insert per-repo M2 records -->
- **Verdict**: <!-- met | missed | partial -->
